title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy document aims to create a law called the "Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act" to shield people from being misled by artificial intelligence technology. The act likely seeks to regulate and provide safeguards to prevent AI being used in deceptive or dishonest ways.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This policy aims to mitigate the environmental effects of artificial intelligence through a legislative framework established by the Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026. The act likely sets regulations to prevent negative environmental consequences caused by the increasing use of AI.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This bill proposes a temporary halt on building new artificial intelligence data centers to assess their potential environmental impacts. The goal is to slow down the development of AI until its effects can be better understood and managed.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The AI Policy Document is named 'Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act', which indicates that it places a temporary halt or restriction on the establishment or expansion of artificial intelligence data centers.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act is a law that allows companies to voluntarily disclose the use of artificial intelligence in their products or services. This act aims to provide transparency to consumers by allowing companies to decide how and when they disclose the use of AI in their products or services.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 aims to develop policies that incorporate artificial intelligence in supporting senior citizens' healthcare and well-being. This act likely focuses on using AI technology to improve the quality of life and care for older adults.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
summary: This document appears to be a policy outlining the use of Artificial Intelligence at the Small Business Administration (SBA), possibly creating guidelines or regulations for AI adoption. It likely aims to standardize and oversee AI utilization within the SBA for the year 2026.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.

summary: This document aims to amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 by adding a prize competition program related to artificial intelligence. The program would be established and managed by the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy.

summary: This policy, the Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act, aims to utilize Artificial Intelligence (AI) to assess and track heat emergencies with the goal of better managing heat-related crises. The specific details and measures under this act are currently unavailable.

title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
